Contributors : Jørgen Buus-Hinkler, Cecilie Wettre, Bruce Hacket 
 
Approval Date: November 2025 
 
For “Icebergs Observed with Sentinel-1 & RCM 
Number Density and Individual icebergs” 
 
SEAICE_ARC_SEAICE_L4_NRT_OBSERVATIONS_011_007 
Issue: 2.14 
PRODUCT USER MANUAL 

 
 
 
2 Product User Manual for SEAICE_ARC_SEAICE_L4_NRT_OBSERVATIONS_011_007 
© EU Copernicus Marine Service – Public   
CMEMS-SI-PUM-011-007 
Issue 2.14 – November 2025 
RECORD TABLE 
Issue Date § Description of Change Author Validated By 
1.1 2011/05/27  
Available time series is from April 1st 2010, 
and NOT 2011 as stated in the previous 
version (1.0) of the PUM.  
Jørgen Buus-Hinkler Jørgen Buus-
Hinkler 
1.2 2011/11/02 Layo
ut Conversion to new MyO PUM format Jørgen Buus-Hinkler Jørgen Buus-
Hinkler 
2.0 2011/11/17  Update file Nomenclature L. Crosnier WP17  
2.1 2014/05/15 II Add MFTP download mechanism Bruce Hackett 
Lars-Anders 
Breivik 
L. Crosnier 
2.3 2015/01/30 III Transition to Sentinel-1,SUBS, DGF 
Nomenclature 
Jørgen Buus-Hinkler 
Bruce Hackett L. Crosnier 
2.4 2015/05/01 All Change format to fit CMEMS graphical 
rules  L. Crosnier 
2.5 2016/01/21 All Finished CMEMS rebranding and content 
update for V2 Jørgen Buus-Hinkler B. Hackett 
2.6 2016/09/30  Inclusion of Sentinel-1B data in 
production, text updated accordingly Jørgen Buus-Hinkler B. Hackett 
2.7 2018/01/25  Rebranded from OSI to SI TAC C. Wettre CMEMS products 
team 
2.8 2019/04/03  Inclusion of Sentinel-1 IW mode for target 
detection, text updated accordingly Jørgen Buus-Hinkler C. Derval 
2.9 2020/03/27  
New CMEMS iceberg dataset (Individual 
Icebergs) in ESRI Shape-format is 
introduced. 
Jørgen Buus-Hinkler C. Wettre 
2.10 2021/01/15 
I.2, 
III.2, 
III.3  
Update of statistical base: The base is now 
continuously updated and based on 
seasonal data. Previously it was 
generalized from all data. Moreover, 
statistical variables will start to be updated 
also in IW-netCDF files. 
J. Buus-Hinkler C. Wettre 
2.11 2023/02/28 III.2 
Added missing information about the 
presence of statistical variables in IW-
mosaic-netCDF files in description table. 
J. Buus-Hinkler C. Wettre 
2.12 2023/03/16 I.2, 
III.3 
Changed info about AIS-based ship 
removal in history of change and in the 
description table for point based 
observations 
J. Buus-Hinkler C. Wettre 
2.13 2024/05/28  
Added figure 3c displaying geographical 
extension of product area of interest for 
point based observations towards pan-
Arctic coverage 
J. Buus-Hinkler C. Wettre 
2.14 2025/05/28  
All products (now also gridded products in 
netCDF files) updated to pan-Arctic 
coverage: New figure 1 added, old 
figures 3a-b-c removed. Radarsat 
Constellation Imagery is now included in 
production, Main text, and dataset 
description are changed accordingly. 
PUM is now updated to latest CMEMS 
layout 
J. Buus-Hinkler C. Wettre

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for SEAICE_ARC_SEAICE_L4_NRT_OBSERVATIONS_011_007, detailing the product specifications and updates related to icebergs observed with Sentinel-1 & RCM Number Density and Individual Icebergs. It includes information on data access, production system description, dataset details, catalogue updating, and file formats.

product_line.name: Icebergs Observed with Sentinel-1 & RCM Number Density and Individual Icebergs
